About the Show

This Is Your
Mixtape.

Unshuffled is a solo-produced radio show about music, memory, and the stories that live inside the songs you forgot you knew.

Every episode is built around a theme — a feeling, a question, a moment in time. Ten songs. Always ten. Every decade represented. One conversation with one listener driving somewhere they needed to go.

The music is sacred. The humor lives everywhere else. And the pauses do the heavy lifting.

10
Songs per episode
5+
Episodes archived
∞
Decades covered
Proudly from Romeo, Michigan  →  Discover Romeo
From the Host

I've Watched Romeo Change
Over the Decades.

"No algorithms. No playlists. No filler. Just great music curated by hand — and the stories most people never knew behind the songs they've loved their whole lives."

Tillson Street. The old storefronts on Main. The Peach Festival every summer without fail. This town has a personality that most places would kill for.

I'm building something I think Romeo will be proud of. A music show called Unshuffled — streaming now on Mixcloud, growing every week, built on real music and the real stories behind it.

Every song gets a proper introduction — the backstory, the moment it was written, what it cost the artist to make it, the detail nobody ever talks about. Then the song plays and it hits different — because now you know what's behind it.

Every episode also features a Forgotten Classic — one song per episode that deserves to be heard again and hasn't been played nearly enough.

As the show grows, my plan is simple — bring Romeo into it. Feature local businesses. Highlight local events. Give this community the platform it deserves right alongside the music.

I want Romeo to help mold what this show becomes. Suggest a year. Suggest a theme. Tell me about a local business or event that deserves a mention. Get involved and you'll get mentioned.

Right now I just need you to listen and share. One share from the right person in a town this connected can change everything.

🍑 Decades in Romeo. Building something worth sharing.
Listen Now Get Involved on Facebook
Shape the Show

Got a Theme Idea?
Let's Hear It.

Suggest a year, a theme, a local business, an event — anything you think belongs on Unshuffled. The best ideas come from the people listening.

✓   Got it. Thanks for being part of the show.

Submissions go directly to the host. Every idea gets read.

Inside Every Episode

Home of

The Segments That Make It Unshuffled

🕰️

Time Warp

A year frozen in amber. Three clips — TV, film, ads, news — that put you right back in the room.

📈

Chart Snapshot

Five songs from one year's Billboard Hot 100. The obvious picks and the ones nobody remembers.

🎵

Forgotten Classic

One song that deserved better. No setup. No send-off. Just the music — and a sweeper to close the door.

🎯

5in5 Challenge

Five songs. Five seconds each. Can you name them from the opening alone? The reveal comes at the end.

🎤

Comedy Break

One observational, one absurdist. The host never explains it. Neither should you.

📺

Commercial Flashback

Ads from before you could skip them. 1950s through 1980s. They went to number one too.
